name: Microsoft Windows RCE Vulnerability - Suspicious Hashes
notes: This rule detects known Windows RCE SHA256 hashes.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Endpoint Protection Devices
when the event matches ("SHA256 Hash" IS NOT NULL AND REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Windows RCE SHA256 Hashes', "SHA256 Hash")) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Microsoft Windows RCE Vulnerability - Suspicious Hashes on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Endpoint Protection Devices
AND when the event matches ("SHA256 Hash" IS NOT NULL AND REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Windows RCE SHA256 Hashes', "SHA256 Hash")) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Microsoft Windows RCE Vulnerability - Suspicious Hashes
Event description: Detects when RCE SHA256 hashes are seen.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
